title: lyonia rubiginosa subsp. costata
intro: Lyonia rubiginosa subsp. costata, also known as the Costate Lyonia or Red-osier Lyonia, is a flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lyonia rubiginosa subsp. costata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
